examples: They evolved to recognise only a few basic tastes in order to quickly identify toxins, which in nature are often quite bitter or acidly sour.
"Nice of you to turn up" she said acidly.
Full of unattractive, acidly drawn characters, particularly those with money who are maladjusted or malignant.
In an acidly satiric style, it is devoted to the feuds among academic factions.
